idea-plugin.name: OpenCode SuperTerminal
idea-plugin.description:
Run OpenCode directly inside a dedicated JetBrains IDE tool window.
A fully interactive terminal is embedded in the right sidebar, automatically launching opencode when opened.

Features:
  • Sidebar-embedded terminal in a dedicated right-side tool window
  • Auto-launches OpenCode on open — no manual commands needed
  • Full terminal emulation (256-color, Unicode, cursor blink, scrollback)
  • Auto-resize when the panel is resized
  • Workspace-aware: opens in the current project directory

Requirements: The opencode CLI must be installed and available on your PATH. Install from opencode.ai.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release: OpenCode SuperTerminal tool window for all IntelliJ-based IDEs
